title: 7 pink lakes in Australia and the science behind their unusual colours
summary_full: Australia features numerous pink lakes scattered across diverse landscapes. These lakes display shifting colours influenced by weather and water conditions. Western Australia's Hutt Lagoon and pink and rainbow lakes are notable examples. South Australia's Kati Thanda-Lake Eyre and Lake MacDonnell also showcase vibrant hues. Victoria's Murray-Sunset National Park adds to the country's collection of these natural wonders.
